name: plexus
description: Remote-device memory and live operating context for host-specific work.

interface.shortDescription: Host-specific REMOTE.md memory with live probes
interface.longDescription: Plexus gives agents a CLAUDE.md-style memory file for each remote host, then combines it with live SSH, Tailscale, Docker, systemd, and syslog-mcp context before operating.
defaultPrompt: Use Plexus to inspect squirts before changing it.
Load live remote context for dookie.
Summarize recent syslog activity for a host.
